name: io.github.OjasKord/url-safety-validator-mcp
description: AI URL safety validator: SAFE/SUSPICIOUS/DANGEROUS verdict, trust score, threat intel.
title: URL Safety Validator

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key for AI trust scoring

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_WEB_RISK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Google Web Risk API key (commercial). Server degrades gracefully without it.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_SAFE_BROWSING_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Google Safe Browsing API key (free tier available).
